description: EXHAUSTION PRINT at bar high. askVol at highest level=120 is 20%+ of totalVol. Delta gate passes (bearish bar, barDelta>0). EXH-05 blocked: |barDelta|=40 < totalVol*0.15=600*0.15=90. Config: ExhaustWickMin=35.0, threshold=effMin/3=11.67%.

bar.notes: totalVol=120+10+100+90+100+90+80+80+60+60+5+5=800. barDelta=(120-10)+(100-90)+(100-90)+(80-80)+(60-60)+(5-5)=110+10+10+0+0+0=130. Wait that's barDelta=130 which is too high for EXH-05 threshold. Need barDelta small. Use balanced inside levels and small imbalance at top. Let me recompute: levels must give barDelta > 0 (bearish bar gate) but |barDelta| < totalVol*0.15. Try totalVol=800, need barDelta in (0, 120). barDelta=110+10+10+0+0+0=130 is still >120. Use: 20005(120ask/10bid=110), rest balanced. totalVol needs barDelta<totalVol*0.15. 110<800*0.15=120. YES 110<120. EXH-05 does NOT fire. askVol at high: pct=120/800*100=15% >= 35/3=11.67% → EXH-02 fires. strength=min(15/20,1)=0.75.
